revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 10 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月10日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 10일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 10 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月初十]][[zh:正月初十]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 10|qq=January 10}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月初十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 10일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 10''' is the 10th day of month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}} the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Eiryaku|ja|Eireki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiryaku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|February 18|en|February 18|qid=Q2343|lt=February 18|1=February 18}} , {{ill|1160|en|1160|qid=Q19662|lt=1160|1=1160}} ) – The era changed from {{ill|Heiji|en|Heiji|qid=Q1193930|lt=Heiji|1=Heiji}} to Eiryaku.
== Births == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 7 (Julian calendar {{ill|February 5|en|February 5|qid=Q2319|lt=February 5|1=February 5}} , {{ill|1579|en|1579|qid=Q6709|lt=1579|1=1579}} ) – {{ill|Suzuki Shōsan|en|Suzuki Shōsan|qid=Q1070220|lt=Suzuki Shōsan|1=Suzuki Shōsan}} , kana-zōshi author (d. {{ill|1655|en|1655|qid=Q6975|lt=1655|1=1655}} )<ref>[https://www.britannica.com/biography/Suzuki-Shosan Suzuki Shōsan Japanese Zen priest] Encyclopædia Britannica</ref> * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|February 3|en|February 3|qid=Q2315|lt=February 3|1=February 3}} , {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} ) – {{ill|Mizuno Rentarō|en|Mizuno Rentarō|qid=Q3183709|lt=Rentaro Mizuno|1=Mizuno Rentarō}} , politician (d. {{ill|1949|en|1949|qid=Q5188|lt=1949|1=1949}} ) * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|February 28|en|February 28|qid=Q2362|lt=February 28|1=February 28}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} ) – {{ill|Takayama Chogyū|en|Takayama Chogyū|qid=Q461853|lt=Takayama Chogyū|1=Takayama Chogyū}} , philosopher (d. {{ill|1902|en|1902|qid=Q2043|lt=1902|1=1902}} ) * Meiji 4 (Gregorian calendar February 28, 1871) – [[:en:Hogetsu Shimamura|Shimamura Hōgetsu]] , playwright (d. {{ill|1918|en|1918|qid=Q2094|lt=1918|1=1918}} )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Shaoxi|ja|紹熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shaoxi|1=Shaoxi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11606212}} 3 (Julian calendar {{ill|January 26|en|January 26|qid=Q2282|lt=January 26|1=January 26}} , {{ill|1192|en|1192|qid=Q19739|lt=1192|1=1192}} ) – {{ill|Lu Jiuyuan|en|Lu Jiuyuan|qid=Q2466384|lt=Lu Xiangshan|1=Lu Jiuyuan}} , Confucian scholar of the Southern Song dynasty (b. {{ill|1139|en|1139|qid=Q19608|lt=1139|1=1139}} ) * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 11 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|February 19|en|February 19|qid=Q2340|lt=February 19|1=February 19}} , {{ill|1671|en|1671|qid=Q7610|lt=1671|1=1671}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yorinobu|en|Tokugawa Yorinobu|qid=Q1045763|lt=Tokugawa Yorinobu|1=Tokugawa Yorinobu}} , 1st lord of the {{ill|Kishū Domain|en|Kishū Domain|qid=Q1069187|lt=Kishū Domain|1=Kishū Domain}} , tenth son of {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} (b. {{ill|1602|en|1602|qid=Q6727|lt=1602|1=1602}} ) * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 6 (Gregorian calendar {{ill|February 19|en|February 19|qid=Q2340|lt=February 19|1=February 19}} , {{ill|1709|en|1709|qid=Q6857|lt=1709|1=1709}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|ja|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , 5th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shogun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Edo Bakufu|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Bakufu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. {{ill|1646|en|1646|qid=Q6930|lt=1646|1=1646}} )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|9|1|11|12|10|2|1|0110|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
